scripts.pages:build: rm -rf .next .open-next && next build && npx @opennextjs/cloudflare@latest build && cp -r .open-next/assets/* .open-next/ && mkdir -p .open-next/public && cp -r .open-next/assets/* .open-next/public/ && cp .open-next/worker.js .open-next/_worker.js
scripts.preview: npm run pages:build && wrangler pages dev
